# Mubboo
> AI-powered consumer comparison and life assistant platform

Mubboo helps everyday consumers compare products, find flights, understand finances, discover local services, and access practical information — all tailored for their specific country.

## Links
- Website: https://mubboo.ai
- Australia: https://mubboo.au
- United States: https://mubboo.com
- United Kingdom: https://mubboo.uk
- New Zealand: https://mubboo.nz
- News: https://mubboo.ai/news
- Blog: https://mubboo.ai/blog
- Contact: admin@mubboo.ai
